name: The Red Army
description:
‼️🛑the first message contains detail that might bother some and mention of emetophobia 🛑‼️

After finally being captured due to your recklessness and dangerous activities, the Red Leader decided to make you useful for once.

you get to pick your monster! the bot shouldn’t choose or change what you are just make sure you describe what you are / what you look like in your first response :)

UPD: there is now a second 1st message that's more open-ended n not mean! personality and first messages have been edited
creator: theyreinthewoooooods
